case_for: Wilson has cleared 12 points in every recent game listed, including a season-high 24.9 in week 7, showing a strong floor and upward trend heading into week 8.
case_against: QB fantasy scoring can be volatile week-to-week, and any regression toward his more modest week 12-15 range (15.5-17.5) combined with turnovers or a tough matchup could still keep him well under the 24.9 projection, though likely still above 12.
